profile.name: Amir Hussain Shaik
profile.title: Senior Electrical & Automation Engineer
profile.headline: Industrial Automation | Material Handling Systems | Project Execution | Lean Six Sigma Black Belt
profile.intro: Delivering reliable engineering solutions across Saudi Arabia, UAE and India with 10+ years of experience in electro-mechanical systems, conveyor solutions, automated storage systems and mission-critical maintenance operations.
profile.location: Riyadh, Saudi Arabia | Available for KSA & UAE projects

about: I am an Electrical & Maintenance Engineer with strong hands-on experience in industrial automation, material handling systems, conveyor systems, car parking solutions, cranes, ETVs and automated storage systems. My work covers installation, commissioning, preventive maintenance, troubleshooting, site coordination, spare parts planning, technical reporting, vendor coordination and client communication. I combine field execution with Lean Six Sigma thinking to improve reliability, reduce downtime and deliver practical engineering solutions in live operational environments.

expertise.title: Industrial Automation & Controls
expertise.text: PLC, SCADA, relay logic, VFDs, sensors, control panels and troubleshooting of automation systems.

expertise.title: Material Handling Systems
expertise.text: Conveyors, ETVs, electric monorail systems, automated storage systems, workstations and logistics equipment.

expertise.title: Installation & Commissioning
expertise.text: Site execution, equipment alignment, electrical works, testing, handover and operational support.

expertise.title: Maintenance Engineering
expertise.text: Preventive maintenance, corrective maintenance, breakdown response, root-cause analysis and reliability improvement.

expertise.title: Project & Site Management
expertise.text: Manpower coordination, documentation, client communication, vendor support, spare parts and safety compliance.

expertise.title: Lean Six Sigma Improvement
expertise.text: Certified Yellow, Green and Black Belt with focus on process improvement, downtime reduction and structured problem solving.

projects.title: DHL Riyadh Conveyor Optimization
projects.challenge: Shipment transfer instability, belt tracking issues and operational downtime risk.
projects.solution: Corrected conveyor alignment, reviewed drive behavior, optimized guide/support arrangement and supported maintenance planning.
projects.result: Improved operational stability, reduced stoppages and strengthened system reliability for live logistics operations.

projects.title: Kardex Automated Sorting System Support
projects.challenge: Complex automated sorting equipment requiring installation support, testing and operational readiness.
projects.solution: Supported installation, testing, snag reporting, inventory handling, site coordination and technical follow-up.
projects.result: Helped achieve smooth project completion and reliable system handover.

projects.title: Car Turntable Maintenance – Private Villa Riyadh
projects.challenge: Specialized residential car turntable requiring planned maintenance and dependable operation.
projects.solution: Managed bi-annual maintenance, inspections, adjustment, troubleshooting and client coordination.
projects.result: Maintained reliable operation and client confidence through structured service support.

experience.text: Managing industrial automation and material handling systems across client sites, including installation, maintenance, troubleshooting, documentation, spare parts planning, client coordination and team support.
Handled shift activities, preventive maintenance, corrective maintenance, reporting, SOP compliance and support to junior technicians in live operational environments.
Worked on PLC basics, SCADA support, motor inverter configuration, control systems, maintenance records and electro-mechanical troubleshooting.
